title: panicum crus-galli var. walteri
intro: Panicum crus-galli var. walteri, also known as Big Bluestem or Walter's Panic Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, characterized by its tall stature and blue-green foliage. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving digestive issues. The health benefits of Big Bluestem include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and promote immune function. Herbal preparations of Panicum crus-galli var. walteri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
